name: Apricot Chocolate Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cut up dried apricots, sugar, milk, vegetable oil, and eggs until well combined.
2. Gradually stir in the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and chopped pecans until just moistened.
3. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and bake for 50-60 minutes in a pre-heated 350°F oven.
4. Allow the bread to cool for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
